languages.text: {n}Лария смотрит на вас, точно дознаватель на допросе.{/n} "Не знаю, как вы сюда попали, но морочить голову Лорд-капитану не позволю. Мне знакомы все ближайшие подданные Себериана. Вы не один из них".

traits.locale_text: {n}Лария смотрит на вас, точно дознаватель на допросе.{/n} "Не знаю, как вы сюда попали, но морочить голову Лорд-капитану не позволю. Мне знакомы все ближайшие подданные Себериана. Вы не один из них".

languages.text: {n}Laria looks at you like an interrogator about to question a suspect.{/n} "I do not know how you got here, but I won't let you distract the Lord Captain with any nonsense. I know all of Seberian's closest subjects. You are not one of them."
languages.original_text: {n}Лария смотрит на вас, точно дознаватель на допросе.{/n} "Не знаю, как вы сюда попали, но морочить голову Лорд-капитану не позволю. Мне знакомы все ближайшие подданные Себериана. Вы не один из них".

traits.locale_text: {n}Laria looks at you like an interrogator about to question a suspect.{/n} "I do not know how you got here, but I won't let you distract the Lord Captain with any nonsense. I know all of Seberian's closest subjects. You are not one of them."

{n}Laria looks at you like an interrogator about to question a suspect.{/n} "I do not know how you got here, but I won't let you distract the Lord Captain with any nonsense. I know all of Seberian's closest subjects. You are not one of them."

{n}Laria looks at you like an interrogator about to question a suspect.{/n} "I do not know how you got here, but I won't let you distract the Lord Captain with any nonsense. I know all of Seberian's closest subjects. You are not one of them."

languages.text: {n}菈丽雅看你的眼神，活像一个准备审问嫌犯的审讯官。{/n}“我不知道你是怎么混进来的，但我绝不会让你拿这些胡话去打扰舰长大人。塞贝里安身边的亲信，我全都认识，你并不在其中。”
languages.original_text: {n}Laria looks at you like an interrogator about to question a suspect.{/n} "I do not know how you got here, but I won't let you distract the Lord Captain with any nonsense. I know all of Seberian's closest subjects. You are not one of them."

traits.locale_text: {n}菈丽雅看你的眼神，活像一个准备审问嫌犯的审讯官。{/n}“我不知道你是怎么混进来的，但我绝不会让你拿这些胡话去打扰舰长大人。塞贝里安身边的亲信，我全都认识，你并不在其中。”

languages.text: {n}Laria vous regarde à la manière d'un interrogateur sur le point de cuisiner un suspect.{/n} « Je ne sais pas comment vous êtes {mf|arrivé|arrivée} jusqu'ici, mais je ne vous laisserai pas importuner le seigneur-capitaine sans une bonne raison. Je connais tous les plus proches sujets de Seberian, et vous n'en faites pas partie. »
languages.original_text: {n}Laria looks at you like an interrogator about to question a suspect.{/n} "I do not know how you got here, but I won't let you distract the Lord Captain with any nonsense. I know all of Seberian's closest subjects. You are not one of them."

traits.locale_text: {n}Laria vous regarde à la manière d'un interrogateur sur le point de cuisiner un suspect.{/n} « Je ne sais pas comment vous êtes {mf|arrivé|arrivée} jusqu'ici, mais je ne vous laisserai pas importuner le seigneur-capitaine sans une bonne raison. Je connais tous les plus proches sujets de Seberian, et vous n'en faites pas partie. »

languages.text: {n}Laria'nın senin üzerindeki bakışları, şüphelisini sorgulamak üzere olan bir sorgucuyu andırıyor.{/n} "Buraya nasıl geldiğinizi bilmiyorum ama zırvalıklarla Lord Kaptan'ın dikkatini dağıtmanıza izin veremem. Seberian'ın en yakın tebaasındaki herkesi tanırım. Sizi tanımıyorum."
languages.original_text: {n}Laria looks at you like an interrogator about to question a suspect.{/n} "I do not know how you got here, but I won't let you distract the Lord Captain with any nonsense. I know all of Seberian's closest subjects. You are not one of them."

traits.locale_text: {n}Laria'nın senin üzerindeki bakışları, şüphelisini sorgulamak üzere olan bir sorgucuyu andırıyor.{/n} "Buraya nasıl geldiğinizi bilmiyorum ama zırvalıklarla Lord Kaptan'ın dikkatini dağıtmanıza izin veremem. Seberian'ın en yakın tebaasındaki herkesi tanırım. Sizi tanımıyorum."

languages.text: {n}Laria te mira como una interrogadora a punto de ponerse a trabajar con un sospechoso.{/n} «No sé cómo ha llegado aquí, pero no permitiré que distraiga al Lord Capitán con sinsentidos. Conozco a todos los súbditos cercanos de Seberian y usted no está entre ellos».
languages.original_text: {n}Laria looks at you like an interrogator about to question a suspect.{/n} "I do not know how you got here, but I won't let you distract the Lord Captain with any nonsense. I know all of Seberian's closest subjects. You are not one of them."

traits.locale_text: {n}Laria te mira como una interrogadora a punto de ponerse a trabajar con un sospechoso.{/n} «No sé cómo ha llegado aquí, pero no permitiré que distraiga al Lord Capitán con sinsentidos. Conozco a todos los súbditos cercanos de Seberian y usted no está entre ellos».

languages.text: {n}Laria sieht dich an, als würde sie dich gleich verhören.{/n} "Ich weiß nicht, wie Ihr hierher gelangt seid, aber ich werde nicht zulassen, dass Ihr den Lord Captain mit irgendwelchem Unsinn ablenkt. Ich kenne Seberians engste Vertraute. Ihr gehört nicht zu ihnen."
languages.original_text: {n}Laria looks at you like an interrogator about to question a suspect.{/n} "I do not know how you got here, but I won't let you distract the Lord Captain with any nonsense. I know all of Seberian's closest subjects. You are not one of them."

traits.locale_text: {n}Laria sieht dich an, als würde sie dich gleich verhören.{/n} "Ich weiß nicht, wie Ihr hierher gelangt seid, aber ich werde nicht zulassen, dass Ihr den Lord Captain mit irgendwelchem Unsinn ablenkt. Ich kenne Seberians engste Vertraute. Ihr gehört nicht zu ihnen."

languages.text: {n}ラリアは容疑者から証言を聞き出す準備をしている尋問官のように君を見つめる。{/n}「君がここに来た経緯は知らないが、君が主将を些細なことで気を散らせないようにする。私はセベリアンの最も近い臣下たちを知っている。君はその一人ではない。」
languages.original_text: {n}Laria looks at you like an interrogator about to question a suspect.{/n} "I do not know how you got here, but I won't let you distract the Lord Captain with any nonsense. I know all of Seberian's closest subjects. You are not one of them."

traits.locale_text: {n}ラリアは容疑者から証言を聞き出す準備をしている尋問官のように君を見つめる。{/n}「君がここに来た経緯は知らないが、君が主将を些細なことで気を散らせないようにする。私はセベリアンの最も近い臣下たちを知っている。君はその一人ではない。」
